backend/main.mo: Motoko actor with a single public function deduplicateComicText that removes duplicate text lines from an array using a Set, trapping on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two bug fixes related to panel filtering and deduplication, both pointing to frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files describing comic styling, deduplication logic with critical panel preservation fix, React components, hooks, contexts, and data structures.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes and design tokens for the comic viewer UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'Spider-Verse Comic Viewer - Into the Spider-Verse' and script tag loading the React app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component wrapping the app with providers (Theme, QueryClient, AppPreferences, ComicSettings, ErrorBoundary) and rendering Header, CharactersGallery, controls, narration/listening sections, ComicViewer, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a comic-styled crash recovery UI with error details and reset/reload buttons.
frontend/src/components/CharactersGaller: Grid gallery component displaying character artwork from CHARACTERS data with hover effects, error fallback handling, and internationalized section title.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Reusable container component for comic panels with heavy borders, shadows, animation, and support for default/highlight/credits variants.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Presentational components for comic elements including CaptionBox, SpeechBubble, ThoughtBubble, SfxText, and SceneLabel with distinct styling for each type.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Main comic viewer component that renders panels with localization, deduplication, progressive loading, and timeline features. Includes chapter navigation, missing illustration alerts, and credits display.
Button component that exports the comic to PDF format with localization support, author name, and timeline mode. Shows loading state during export and displays toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, attribution to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking, and credits information with i18n support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with comic title, subtitle, language selector, and theme toggle button (light/dark mode).
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown select component for choosing the application language from available translations, integrated with app preferences context.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Toggle switch control for enabling/disabling repetition removal in comic panels, with descriptive label and help text.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Speech recognition control component that allows users to dictate story content, displays listening status, and passes transcript updates to parent component.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Text-to-speech narration control with voice selection for different characters (Miles, Jefferson, default), playback controls, and narration script generation from comic panels.
Panel displaying speech recognition transcript with word count, copy to clipboard functionality, and clear button. Shows both finalized and interim transcript text.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedPanelIma: Image component with error handling that reports missing images to parent, falls back to placeholder image, and preserves layout aspect ratio for text overlays.
frontend/src/contexts/AppPreferencesCont: React context provider that manages and persists user preferences (language, author name, timeline mode) to localStorage with BCP-47 language tag validation.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: React context provider that manages comic-specific settings, currently tracking whether repetition removal is enabled (defaults to true).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, switching between authenticated and anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useI18n.ts: Hook that provides internationalization functionality by wrapping the translation function with the current language from app preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingIllustratio: Hook that tracks and reports missing illustration assets by collecting filenames of failed image loads, with a 100-item cap for memory safety.
Hook for progressive rendering of comic panels in batches to avoid performance issues, managing visible count with load-more, load-all, and reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for deduplicating comic text lines via the backend actor, with query invalidation on success.
Hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API for continuous voice input with interim results, providing transcript state and error handling for microphone access and network issues.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Hook that loads and tracks available browser text-to-speech voices, handling asynchronous voice loading via the voiceschanged event.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Hook for narrating story scripts using Web Speech API with per-speaker voice selection, playback controls (play/pause/resume/stop), and configurable rate/pitch parameters.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom comic book-themed design tokens (light/dark modes), typography styles, and component classes for comic panels, speech bubbles, captions, and visual effects like halftone patterns and ink overlays.
frontend/src/lib/characters.ts: Defines character data structure and exports an array of 10 Spider-Verse characters with IDs, names, and artwork asset paths for display in the application.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Contains structured comic panel data for Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse organized into chapters, with timestamps, illustrations, dialogue, captions, and sample translations in multiple languages.
frontend/src/lib/comicLocalization.ts: Provides functions to localize comic panels, chapters, and text content by resolving translations based on language tags with English fallback support.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for comic panel structure including panel kinds, part types (caption, dialogue, thought, sfx, scene), chapters, and utility functions for text extraction and flattening.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements deduplication logic to remove repeated text lines and panel parts across comic panels while preserving all panel structures and illustrations, with functions to count total text lines.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Internationalization module that manages translation dictionaries for six languages (en, es, fr, de, ja, zh), provides translation lookup with variable substitution, and normalizes language tags.
frontend/src/lib/locales/de.ts: German translation dictionary containing localized strings for UI elements, controls, narration features, timeline mode, PDF export, and application labels.
frontend/src/lib/locales/en.ts: English translation dictionary containing UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, transcript, PDF export, stats, language selection, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/locales/es.ts: Spanish translation dictionary with the same UI string keys as the English version, providing localized text for all application features.
frontend/src/lib/locales/fr.ts: French translation dictionary providing localized UI strings for the comic viewer application, matching the structure of other locale files.
frontend/src/lib/locales/ja.ts: Japanese translation dictionary containing all UI strings translated to Japanese, following the same key structure as other locale files.
frontend/src/lib/locales/zh.ts: Chinese translation dictionary providing simplified Chinese translations for all application UI strings and labels.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Converts comic panels to narration script items with text and optional speaker metadata, applying deduplication when repetition removal is enabled.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Exports comic panels to PDF by generating printable HTML with title page, chapter sections, panel content, and styling, then opening the browser print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/timeline.ts: Provides utility functions for formatting timestamps and timestamp ranges for comic panels aligned to a 1h 56m movie runtime (6960 seconds).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the App component.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: TypeScript ambient type definitions for the Web Speech API, including SpeechRecognition interfaces and event types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including comic-style shadows, OKLCH color system, custom fonts (Bangers, Arial), and various design tokens.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a bug fix request where 18 comic panels are incorrectly removed from the viewer, with features focused on fixing panel filtering and repetition removal logic.
